2605.00347.title: Odysseus: Scaling VLMs to 100+ Turn Decision-Making in Games via Reinforcement Learning
2605.00347.paper_summary: Given the rapidly growing capabilities of vision-language models (VLMs), extending them to interactive decision-making tasks such as video games has emerged as a promising frontier. However, existing approaches either rely on large-scale supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on human trajectories or apply reinforcement learning (RL) only in relatively short-horizon settings (typically around 20--30 turns). In this work, we study RL-based training of VLMs for long-horizon decision-making in Super Mario Land, a visually grounded environment requiring 100+ turns of interaction with coordinated perception, reasoning, and action. We begin with a systematic investigation of key algorithmic components and propose an adapted variant of PPO with a lightweight turn-level critic, which substantially improves training stability and sample efficiency over critic-free methods such as GRPO and Reinforce++. We further show that pretrained VLMs provide strong action priors, significantly improving sample efficiency during RL training and reducing the need for manual design choices such as action engineering, compared to classical deep RL trained from scratch. Building on these insights, we introduce Odysseus, an open training framework for VLM agents, achieving substantial gains across multiple levels of the game and at least 3 times average game progresses than frontier models. Moreover, the trained models exhibit consistent improvements under both in-game and cross-game generalization settings, while maintaining general-domain capabilities. Overall, our results identify key ingredients for making RL stable and effective in long-horizon, multi-modal settings, and provide practical guidance for developing VLMs as embodied agents.
2605.00347.paper_summary_zh: 考慮到視覺-語言模型（VLMs）快速增長的能力，將其擴展到互動決策任務，如視頻遊戲，已成為一個有前景的前沿領域。<lb/>然而，現有的方法要麼依賴於對人類軌跡的大規模監督微調（SFT），要麼僅在相對短期的設置中（通常約20到30回合）應用強化學習（RL）。<lb/>在本研究中，我們研究了在《超級瑪利歐世界》中基於RL的VLM訓練，以進行長期決策，這是一個視覺基礎的環境，需要與協調的感知、推理和行動進行100多回合的互動。<lb/>我們首先系統地調查了關鍵算法組件，並提出了一種改編的PPO變體，配備輕量級的回合級評論員，這顯著提高了訓練穩定性和樣本效率，相較於無評論員的方法，如GRPO和Reinforce++。<lb/>我們進一步顯示，預訓練的VLM提供了強大的行動先驗，顯著提高了RL訓練期間的樣本效率，並減少了手動設計選擇（如行動工程）的需求，與從零開始訓練的經典深度RL相比。<lb/>基於這些見解，我們介紹了Odysseus，一個開放的VLM代理訓練框架，在遊戲的多個級別上實現了顯著的增益，並且平均遊戲進展至少是前沿模型的3倍。<lb/>此外，訓練後的模型在遊戲內和跨遊戲的泛化設置下均顯示出一致的改進，同時保持一般領域的能力。<lb/>總體而言，我們的結果確定了在長期、多模態設置中使RL穩定和有效的關鍵成分，並為開發作為具身代理的VLM提供了實用指導。
2605.00347.author: Chengshuai Shi et.al.
2605.00347.authors: Chengshuai Shi, Wenzhe Li, Xinran Liang, Yizhou Lu, Wenjia Yang, Ruirong Feng, Seth Karten, Ziran Yang, Zihan Ding, Gabriel Sarch, Danqi Chen, Karthik Narasimhan, Chi Jin
